reason: Successfully navigated to localhost, found agent QA-20260331-163003-scfa, verified status as "idle", sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?", waited for response, and verified response contains "4".
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with Super Agent title and sidebar visible containing multiple agents including QA-20260331-163003-scfa.

Found and clicked agent "QA-20260331-163003-scfa" in sidebar - Agent detail page opened, showing agent status as "idle" and a message composition area with the heading "Start a conversation with QA-20260331-163003-scfa".
Verified agent status is "idle" - Agent status displayed as "idle" in the UI, which meets the requirement (running or idle).

Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" by typing in message input and clicking Send button - Message was successfully submitted, agent status changed to "working", and a new session "Math Basics Quick Question" was created.
Waited up to 3 minutes for response - Agent responded within 2 seconds with the answer "4" as shown in the chat view with "Worked for 2s" indicator.
Verified response mentions "4" - The agent response clearly displays the number "4" as the answer to the math question.
Took screenshot capturing the successful response - Screenshot saved showing the full chat interface with user message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and agent response "4".
